label: Instruction Pipeline
description: Signal, instruction, and fill columns with real-time updates, status filters, and expandable detail rows.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.4.note: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file; data comes via useInstructionsData().

0.6.note: Context is synchronous mock; LiveFeedWidget base supports isLoading prop but context does not expose it. Wire isLoading from context when real API is introduced.

0.7.note: InstructionPipelineRows renders 'No instructions match the current filters' when filteredInstructions.length === 0.

0.8.note: Context is synchronous; LiveFeedWidget base supports error+onRetry props but context does not expose error. Wire error from context when real API is introduced.

l0.notes: All checks pass or N/A (mock-pending). Loading/error wiring deferred to API integration.

1.1.note: Data sourced exclusively from useInstructionsData() hook; no inline fetch or direct import.

1.2.note: Context calls useGlobalScope() and derives scopeStrategyIds via getStrategyIdsForScope().

1.3.note: organizationIds in scope drives scopeStrategyIds which filters allInstructions.

1.4.note: clientIds in scope drives scopeStrategyIds cascade via getStrategyIdsForScope().

1.5.note: strategyIds in scope drives scopeStrategyIds filter directly.

1.6.note: When scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 the filter is skipped so all instructions are returned.

1.7.note: INSTRUCTION_STRATEGY_TYPES in lib/config/services/instructions.config; TRADING_OPERATION_TYPES in lib/config/services/trading.config.

l1.notes: All 7 checks pass. Context properly scoped via useGlobalScope() + getStrategyIdsForScope().

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live=yes (live pipeline rows), paper=yes (rows tagged with '(Simulated)' strategyType), batch=yes (filtered to FILLED instructions only).

3.2.note: instructions-data-context.tsx:46 reads {isPaper, isBatch, mode} from useExecutionMode(). filteredInstructions memo at line 63 branches on isBatch (filter to FILLED) and isPaper (strategyType tagged).

3.3.note: Instruction pipeline is a read/monitor view; no order/trade submission buttons in this widget.

3.4.note: Human check: batch mode visual indicator visible in widget or layout header. Agent cannot verify visually.

3.5.note: Paper mode: context maps instructions to tagged strategyType '(Simulated)'. Pipeline table rows display the tagged type. Behavior is defined and wired.

3.6.note: No WebSocket, setInterval, or useEffect in data context or widget file. refresh() is a no-op stub pending real API.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. 3.3 N/A (no order entry). 3.4 deferred to human walkthrough.

4.1.note: onClick handlers: resetFilters (line 46) calls context.resetFilters() — functional. refresh (line 55) calls context.refresh() which is a no-op stub — logged as known issue, not a dead button (it will be wired). onToggle in InstructionPipelineRow toggles selectedInstructionId — functional.

4.2.note: No href links in widget file.

4.3.note: Human check: verify strategy-type and operation-type filter dropdowns cover all relevant filter values.

4.4.note: Human check: selecting a filter updates rows; clicking Refresh triggers visible feedback.

4.5.note: No links to gated pages in this widget.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks performed inside widget render. Entitlement handled at registry/wrapper level.

4.7.note: Human check: expandable row detail (InstructionDetailGrid inline) toggles correctly on row click.

4.8.note: Human check: table rows scroll within widget bounds; toolbar does not overflow.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1/4.2/4.5/4.6 pass. 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 deferred to human walkthrough.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all strategy types in INSTRUCTION_STRATEGY_TYPES (BASIS_TRADE, RECURSIVE_STAKED_BASIS, AMM_LP, LENDING_ARB, FLASH_LOAN, STAKING, SPORTS_ARB, CEFI_MM, OPTIONS_MM). Registry IDs: DEFI_ETH_BASIS_HUF_1H, DEFI_ETH_REC_STAKE_HUF_1H, DEFI_UNI_LP_HUF_1H, CEFI_BTC_MM_EVT_TICK, CEFI_ETH_OPT_MM_EVT_TICK, CEFI_BTC_BASIS_SCE_1H, SPORTS_NFL_ARB_SCE_GAME, PRED_POLY_ARB_SCE_1M, PRED_BTC_CEFI_ARB_SCE_5M.

5.2.note: Human check: verify all instruction fields (signal direction, confidence, op type, side, qty, price, venue, fill status) are visible per strategy type.

5.3.note: Human check: after order submission, instruction appears in pipeline with correct fill status.

5.4.note: Human check: empty filter result shows empty state message; all-FILLED batch mode shows only filled rows.

5.5.note: Human check: instruction selected in this table drives instr-detail-panel content.

5.6.note: Human check: verify pipeline rows render correctly for defi, cefi, sports, and predictions strategy types.

l5.notes: 5.1 documented from strategy registry. All other checks deferred to human walkthrough.

l6.notes: Deferred to L6 pass after L5 human sign-off.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors in instructions-pipeline-table-widget.tsx.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

7.3.note: Widget file is 69 lines; instruction-pipeline-rows.tsx is 190 lines; both within limits.

7.4.note: Components PascalCase (InstructionsPipelineTableWidget, InstructionPipelineRows, InstructionPipelineRow), files kebab-case, hook useCamelCase.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, or innerHTML= in widget or subcomponent files.

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in widget file. No inline object/array literals in deps. All memoization is in data context.

l7.notes: All mechanically-fixable L7 checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred. Note: instruction-pipeline-rows.tsx and instruction-detail-grid.tsx had text-[10px] violations fixed in L8.1 pass (same session).

8.1.note: instruction-pipeline-rows.tsx had 8 instances of text-[10px] — all replaced with text-caption (0.6875rem, 11px). Remaining 2 instances of text-[9px] in Badge classNames resolved after --text-nano (0.5625rem / 9px) landed — replaced with text-nano. instruction-detail-grid.tsx had 3 instances of text-[10px] — all replaced with text-caption. instructions-pipeline-table-widget.tsx had no violations.

8.2.note: No p/m-[...] or gap-[...] arbitrary spacing in widget or subcomponent files.

8.3.note: Widget uses Button from components/ui/button, Select/SelectContent/SelectItem/SelectTrigger/SelectValue from components/ui/select, Badge from components/ui/badge. LiveFeedWidget shared primitive used as container. No custom div+tailwind reimplementation of shared primitives.

8.4.note: Agent grep: no img without alt, no input without label. Interactive div in InstructionPipelineRow (instruction-pipeline-rows.tsx:76) has role='button' and tabIndex={0} with onKeyDown handler — compliant. Human keyboard + screen-reader pass deferred.

8.5.note: Human check: renders correctly at minW=6/minH=6; toolbar overflow-x-auto handles narrow widths.

l8.notes: Agent-fixable 8.1-8.3 done. 8.1 text-[9px] badge violations resolved via --text-nano token; no arbitrary values remain. 8.4 agent-grep clean; human pass deferred. 8.5 deferred.

keepSeparate.rationale: Pipeline table is the primary master widget; detail panel is optional and resizable independently. Keeping separate enables the 'instructions-default' preset (table only) vs 'instructions-with-detail' preset (table + panel).

relationships.notes: Row selection in this widget sets selectedInstructionId in InstructionsDataContext, which drives instr-detail-panel content. Both widgets share InstructionsDataContext.

dataContract.notes: Currently uses synchronous MOCK_STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS via context. Refresh is a no-op stub. When real API lands, context must add isLoading+error and wire refresh() to REST poll or WebSocket subscription.

gaps: No real API wired; mock data covers limited strategy types
isLoading and error states not reachable with current mock context
Refresh button is a no-op stub
coverage.notes: Widget is venue-agnostic; renders any instruction type present in the filtered context. Coverage completeness depends on mock fixture breadth.

knownIssues: context does not expose isLoading or error; LiveFeedWidget base already supports both props but they are not wired — add when real API replaces mock data
refresh() is a no-op stub in instructions-data-context.tsx:138 — must be wired to API call when backend is ready

findings.description: instructions-pipeline-table-widget.tsx + instruction-pipeline-rows.tsx — user-visible strings including filter labels, Reset, Refresh, empty-state message, Pending... Not fixed until i18n ships.
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
Replaced all 8 instances with text-caption (0.6875rem = 11px, nearest semantic token in @theme inline).

findings.description: instruction-pipeline-rows.tsx:118,127 — text-[9px] in Badge className (badge-level sub-caption size, no token available).
findings.fix: Token --text-nano (0.5625rem / 9px) landed in globals.css. Replaced both text-[9px] instances with text-nano.

findings.description: instruction-detail-grid.tsx:16,29,45 — text-[10px] hardcoded arbitrary font size in section headers.
findings.fix: Replaced all 3 instances with text-caption (0.6875rem = 11px, nearest semantic token).
